The '''XG Anti-Gravity Field Bomb''' was a [[repulsor mine]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. There were employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to keep local resistance groups at bay, and to help put down uprisings which used [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles. [[Repulsorlift/Legends|Repulsorlift]] vehicles were often impounded and Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] laid these [[Mine/Legends|mines]] on the roads in towns where there were major signs of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] activity. Because the bombs only responded to [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] fluctuations, people and non-repulsorlift vehicles safely walked over them. They were typically buried about a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] below the ground. If tripped, it would detonate, destroying [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] and [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] once infiltrated an Imperial fortress with a case of captured mines and placed them on a dozen speeder bikes. When the Rebels attacked the fortress about an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] later, the Imperials, in response, activated their speeder bikes, detonating the mines.<ref name="CRFG" /> [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] used these mines for covering retreats and attacking patrols or [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]]. They also seeded minefields before pulling off a hit-and-fade assault, then retreating over the minefield on foot, by hover vehicle, or on animal mounts. Repulsor-mounted Imperial pursuit would then give chase and trigger the minefield.<ref name="RoE">''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''</ref>
